subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My leaf! Verily the Pen of the Most High hath borne witness unto thy recognition of Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ورقتی قد شهد لک القلم الاعلی باقبالک و حبک و توجهک الی وجه القدم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
